brief.title: <abbr title='Home Box Office'>HBO</abbr>
brief.work: Redesign & Accessibility implementation to the Website
brief.scope: Contributed to a redesign and accessibility implementation initiative for the HBO website, improving how content was presented while bringing the platform closer to modern web accessibility standards.
brief.problem: The existing website needed a visual and structural redesign along with accessibility improvements, all while integrating with an enterprise content management system (AEM) and coordinating with backend microservices.
key_challenges: Retrofitting accessibility standards into an existing, content-heavy website without disrupting editorial workflows.
Integrating React-based components within an AEM (Adobe Experience Manager) environment.
Coordinating frontend changes with GraphQL/Apollo Client data layers and Spring Boot microservices.
key_contributions: Implemented accessibility improvements across key website flows using semantic HTML5 and ARIA-aligned patterns.
Built and maintained reusable UI components (React, MUI, React Bootstrap, Redux, Storybook).
Integrated frontend components with GraphQL/Apollo Client for consistent data fetching.
Contributed to unit and integration test coverage (Jest, Enzyme) to safeguard the redesign.
technical_focus: Component-based UI development and state management (Redux).
brief.suggested_diagrams: Redesign rollout flow across CMS-managed pages. Frontend-AEM-backend integration architecture. Accessibility audit-to-implementation pipeline.
suggested_diagrams_charts:
flowchart TD
    A["Content authored in AEM"] --> B["Apply new component templates"]
    B --> C["Staging review"]
    C --> D{"Approved?"}
    D -- No --> B
    D -- Yes --> E["Phased production rollout"]
    E --> F["Section: Home"]
    E --> G["Section: Shows"]
    E --> H["Section: Movies"]

flowchart TD
    B["Browser"] --> R["React Components"]
    R --> A["AEM Content API"]
    R --> G["GraphQL and Apollo Client"]
    G --> S["Spring Boot Microservices"]
    A --> S

flowchart TD
    A["Accessibility audit"] --> B["Findings triaged"]
    B --> C["Engineering backlog"]
    C --> D["Implement semantic HTML and ARIA"]
    D --> E["Regression testing"]
    E --> F{"Passes WCAG checks?"}
    F -- No --> D
    F -- Yes --> G["Sign-off and release"]
system_impact: Improved accessibility compliance across a major entertainment website.
Delivered a modernized visual experience without disrupting existing CMS workflows.
Strengthened frontend-backend integration patterns for future feature work.
learnings: Accessibility is most effective when treated as a core design constraint rather than a post-launch fix. This project reinforced how enterprise CMS environments require careful architectural decisions to balance editorial flexibility with engineering best practices.
